sections.paragraph: defectively רְבֻשׁ Gen 14:11, 16 Gen 14:16, 21 Gen 14:21 15:14 with suff. רְבוּשֹׁו 2Ch 31:3 רְכֻשֹׁו Gen 31:18, m.; pr. that which is acquired, earned; hence substance, wealth, Gen 14:16. רְבוּשׁ הַמֶּלֶךְ the (private) property of the king, 2Ch 35:7. שָׂרֵי הָֽרְכוּשׁ the overseers of the property (of the king), 1Ch 27:31 28:1 . Root רָכַשׁ.
